title: Here & Now — Nexus Cue Library
theme: School at night. Bodies and voices that begin contained, institutional, whispered — and slowly open into something true.

scenes.name: Scene 1: Arrival
scenes.description: Students enter the building. The film begins in the institutional register — contained, role-bound, small. The camera watches them inhabit a space they know.

beats.name: Beat 1: First Contact
beats.description: The moment of arrival. Students in the building after dark for the first time on camera. Everything is heightened self-consciousness.

cues.label: Threshold
cues.text: You know this building. Tonight it doesn't quite know you back.

cues.label: Permission
cues.text: You are allowed to not know what comes next.

cues.label: Anchor
cues.text: Find one thing in this corridor that is real. Stay near it.

cues.label: The Body Knows
cues.text: Your body has walked this corridor a hundred times. Tonight the walk is different. Let it be different.

beats.name: Beat 2: The Institutional Body
beats.description: Students moving through the space in the contained register. Whispered. Cautious. The school as it feels after hours.

cues.label: Small
cues.text: You know exactly how to make yourself smaller in this building. You've been practising for years.

cues.label: Listening
cues.text: You can hear things in this building you can't hear during the day. Listen.

cues.label: Shouldn't Be Here
cues.text: Some part of you thinks you shouldn't be here. That part is wrong.

cues.label: The Watcher
cues.text: Someone is watching you very carefully. Let them.

cues.label: Role
cues.text: You know exactly what role you play in this building during the day. You're not playing it now.

scenes.name: Scene 2: The Reason
scenes.description: Each student has a private reason for being in the building tonight. They haven't told each other. The cues probe this interior space without forcing it to the surface.

beats.name: Beat 1: The Private Thing
beats.description: Interior state work. The camera gets close. Subtexts that create a private event the lens can find.

cues.label: Secret
cues.text: You have a reason for being here tonight that you haven't told anyone. You don't have to. Just know it.

cues.label: Decision
cues.text: You made a decision this evening that you haven't told anyone about yet.

cues.label: Left Behind
cues.text: You left something behind today. You're not sure if you meant to.

cues.label: Unfinished
cues.text: There's something in this building you haven't finished. You came back for it.

cues.label: Memory
cues.text: This exact spot holds a memory you weren't expecting to find tonight.

beats.name: Beat 2: First Contact With Another
beats.description: Students begin to notice each other. The social negotiation of being found somewhere unexpected.

cues.label: Found
cues.text: You didn't expect to find someone else here. You're not sure how you feel about it.

cues.label: Explain
cues.text: You're not sure whether to explain yourself. You don't have to.

cues.label: Seen
cues.text: They can see something in you right now that no one sees during school hours.

cues.label: Relational — Push
cues.text: You trust them more than you're letting on.

cues.label: Relational — Pull
cues.text: You're not sure they mean it yet. Wait.

scenes.name: Scene 3: The Forgetting
scenes.description: The task absorbs. The camera recedes. Something unplanned becomes true. These cues are task-based and relational — they give students something to carry so the self-consciousness dissolves.

beats.name: Beat 1: Task Absorption
beats.description: Give them something to do that is more real than performing. The task becomes the container.

cues.label: Task — The Object
cues.text: Find something in this room that doesn't belong here. Don't touch it. Just know where it is.

cues.label: Task — The Space
cues.text: Find the part of this room that is most yours. Stand in it.

cues.label: Task — The Other
cues.text: Watch the person nearest to you without watching them. Know what they're feeling.

cues.label: The Camera Disappears
cues.text: The task is the only thing. Everything else — including the camera — doesn't matter right now.

cues.label: Time
cues.text: You have nowhere to be. Time is not running out. Let it slow down.

beats.name: Beat 2: The Opening
beats.description: The contained register begins to crack. Something more true starts to surface. Hold this. Don't interrupt it.

cues.label: Space
cues.text: You are allowed to take up more space than this.

cues.label: Voice
cues.text: You have a voice you don't use in this building during the day. It's available now.

cues.label: More Yourself
cues.text: Being here after dark is making you more yourself, not less.

cues.label: The Change
cues.text: Something just changed. You don't need to name it. Just stay with it.

cues.label: Arrival
cues.text: Something is about to happen. You don't need to make it happen. Just don't get out of the way.

beats.name: Beat 3: The Genuine Exchange
beats.description: Two or more students in a real encounter. Something unscripted passes between them. Relational cues fired to pairs simultaneously.

cues.label: Tell Them — A
cues.text: You have something to tell them. You've been waiting for the right moment. This might be it.

cues.label: Receive — B
cues.text: They're about to say something true. Listen to the thing underneath the words.

cues.label: Ask
cues.text: Ask them one question you actually want to know the answer to.

cues.label: True Thing
cues.text: Say one true thing. Not a character. You.

cues.label: The Unsaid
cues.text: Tell them the one thing you decided not to say.

scenes.name: Scene 4: The Integration
scenes.description: Students have moved from performers to participants. The network — edit, score, RGB, Nexus — is a unified, live thing. Cues become sparse. The film is doing the work now.

beats.name: Beat 1: Full Presence
beats.description: The moment the audience stops watching the system and starts watching the person. Don't interrupt it. Fire minimally.

cues.label: Enough
cues.text: This is already enough.

cues.label: Here
cues.text: You are exactly where you are supposed to be.

cues.label: Survived
cues.text: You have already survived this moment. You just haven't caught up yet.

cues.label: Don't Make
cues.text: You don't need to make anything happen.

beats.name: Beat 2: Toward the Ending
beats.description: The performance finds its own close. These cues are not endings — they are conditions for one. The best ending is the one most true to the live moment.

cues.label: Last Time
cues.text: This is the last time this particular group of people will be in this particular building together.

cues.label: Witnessed
cues.text: You have been seen tonight. Really seen. That has already happened.

cues.label: Stay
cues.text: Stay in it. Don't resolve it. Just stay.

scenes.name: Scene 5: Rehearsal Tools
scenes.description: Cues used only in workshop and rehearsal contexts — not in performance. For calibration, debrief preparation, and probing individual students.

beats.name: Beat 1: Calibration Cues
beats.description: Used in Mon–Thu workshops to probe and observe. Not deployed in performance.

cues.label: Stop Performing
cues.text: No one here is watching you perform. They're watching you exist. Those are different things.

cues.label: School Voice
cues.text: That's your school voice. You have a different one.

cues.label: Underneath
cues.text: You don't have to answer the question they asked. You can answer the one underneath it.

cues.label: The Protected Thing
cues.text: There's something you're protecting right now. You don't have to give it up. Just know it's there.

cues.label: Recovery
cues.text: That moment didn't land. That's fine. The next one is still available.

beats.name: Beat 2: Targeted — Space & Identity
beats.description: For specific students who may feel most self-conscious in the institutional space. Use with judgment. Never broadcast — always targeted.

cues.label: Belong
cues.text: You belong in this space exactly as much as anyone else. Possibly more.

cues.label: Yours
cues.text: This building has had an idea of who you are. Tonight you get to show it something else.

cues.label: Known
cues.text: The person you are right now — not the one this place expects — is the one the camera is looking for.

beats.name: Beat 3: The 17:00 Cue
beats.description: Broadcast to all students at exactly 17:00 on performance day. Fired once, into the silence of the rest period. Not direction. True.

cues.label: 17:00 Broadcast
cues.text: Tonight is not a performance. It is the last time this particular group of people will be in this particular building together.

beats.name: Beat 4: The Q&A Cue
beats.description: Fired to all students as the Q&A opens. The final transmission of the project.

cues.label: Final Cue
cues.text: Tell them one true thing about tonight.
